haikus.haiku:
Juicy mango bliss,
Sunset orange, sweet delight,
Joy drips with each bite.
Happy #NationalMangoDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Children chase and laugh,
Colorful tails swiftly twine,
Joy spills through the air.
Happy #RatCatcherSDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Seeds of joy abound,
Patterns bloom in rich colors,
Life's tales intertwine.
#HappyBirthdayGregorMendel from @ClamBakeSanta
